title: 5 Rules for Long-Term Investing
excerpt: Time-tested principles to build a resilient long-term portfolio.
content: Build a diversified portfolio, rebalance annually, and focus on low-cost funds. We discuss risk tolerance, horizon, and tax-efficient strategies in depth.

title: Dollar-Cost Averaging Explained
excerpt: A disciplined approach to investing regardless of market timing.
content: Set a fixed amount each period; the market price fluctuations automatically purchase fewer or more shares, smoothing the entry cost over time.

title: Why Rebalancing Matters
excerpt: Keeping risk in check through periodic adjustment.
content: Regularly selling winners and buying laggards realigns your mix to the target allocation and enforces a buy-low, sell-high discipline.

title: How Interest Rates Impact Valuations
excerpt: A clear explainer showing the link between rates and asset prices.
content: Interest rates set the discount rate for future cash flows. When rates rise, valuations compress; when rates fall, growth stocks often expand multiples.

title: Tax-Efficient Investing 101
excerpt: Strategies for minimizing taxes on returns across accounts.
content: Utilize tax-advantaged accounts, harvest losses, and prioritize tax-efficient funds in taxable accounts.

title: Navigating Volatility with Bonds
excerpt: Using bond ladders and duration to dampen market swings.
content: Bonds offer a stabilizing anchor; learn how to ladder maturities and monitor credit to build resilience into your portfolio.

title: Cryptocurrency: Beyond the Hype
excerpt: Assessing crypto assets from a risk/reward standpoint.
content: Understand blockchain fundamentals, tokenomics, and how to position a small, speculative sleeve within a broader allocation.
